dashboard.title: Team member dashboard
dashboard.meta_title: Team Member Dashboard | Helwan University Club
dashboard.meta_description: Team member dashboard: Profile, sports, court booking, and notifications.
dashboard.page_subtitle: Comprehensive view of your training and monthly sessions schedule

calendar.select_day: Select a day from the calendar
calendar.no_invite_token: No invite link available for this booking.
calendar.copy_failed: Failed to copy invite link. Try again.

my_sports.title: My Sports
my_sports.empty: You haven't joined any sports yet
my_sports.error: Failed to load sports data. Please try again.

alerts.expires_soon: Your subscription expires in {{days}} {{unit}}. Renew now.
alerts.expired: Your subscription has expired. Rejoin to continue training.

logout_modal.title: Are you sure you want to logout?
logout_modal.description: Your current session will end and you can log in again later.

validation.first_name_arabic: First name must contain only Arabic letters
validation.last_name_arabic: Last name must contain only Arabic letters
validation.phone_invalid: Phone must be 11 digits and start with 010, 011, 012, or 015
validation.national_id_invalid: National ID must be 14 digits and not start with zero
validation.age_min: Age must be 16 years or older
validation.file_unsupported: File type not supported. Allowed: JPG, PNG, PDF

sports.title: Enrolled Sports
sports.no_sports: You haven't joined any sports yet
sports.info_message: The sports activity management will review your join request. You can join a maximum of 4 sports.

validation.date_invalid: End date must be after start date
validation.max_sports: You cannot join more than 4 sports

explore_sports.title: Explore Sports
explore_sports.subtitle: Discover available sports teams loaded from the system
explore_sports.no_sports: No sports currently available in the system

alerts.already_active: You already have an active subscription for this sport. You can only rejoin after your current subscription expires.
alerts.load_failed: Failed to load sports from server

court_rental.title: Court Rental
court_rental.subtitle: Easily choose courts and activities based on available times for this week.

calendar.time_reserved_alert: Time is pre-reserved and cannot be selected.
calendar.select_future_time: Please select a future available time.
calendar.time_conflict: This time is reserved or conflicts. Please choose another time.

dialog.title: Confirm Court Appointment
dialog.description: Make sure to choose your timing accurately, you can book in half-hour intervals!

alerts.specify_times: Please specify start and end times for the booking.
alerts.end_after_start: End time must be after start time.
alerts.conflict: This time is reserved or conflicts. Please choose another time.
alerts.login_required: You must log in first to complete the booking
alerts.success: ✅ Booking request submitted successfully! Redirecting to payment...
alerts.fail: Failed to complete booking. Please try again
alerts.load_sports_fail: Failed to load sports from server
alerts.load_fields_fail: Failed to load fields from server

notifications.welcome_msg: Your account has been successfully activated as a team member.
notifications.training_today_msg: You have a {{sport}} training session today at {{time}}.
notifications.new_subscription_msg: Your subscription to {{sport}} has been successfully confirmed.
notifications.expiry_msg_today: Your subscription to {{sport}} expires today. Rejoin to continue training.
notifications.expiry_msg_days: Your subscription to {{sport}} will expire in {{days}} {{day_unit}}.
notifications.important_notice_msg: Please follow the training schedule and adhere to the timings.

pending_access.description: Thank you for joining us! Your data is currently being reviewed by the club management. We will activate your account as soon as the verification process is complete.
pending_access.footer: © {{year}} Helwan University Club - All rights reserved

payment.title: Payment Page
payment.description_subscription: Complete payment first. After payment, your subscription will be activated immediately.
payment.description_booking: Complete payment to confirm court booking.
payment.invalid_data: Incomplete payment data. Please go back and select the slot again.

alerts.incomplete_data: Incomplete payment data. Please try again.
alerts.missing_subscription: Could not find your subscription. Please join the sport again.
alerts.success_subscription: Payment completed successfully. Your subscription is now active.

success_modal.title: Booking Confirmed Successfully!
success_modal.description: Your booking has been registered and fees paid successfully. You can now invite your friends to join this booking via the following link.
